location.geofencecollection.CollectionNa.Description: The name for the geofence collection.

location.geofencecollection.Description.Description: An optional description for the geofence collection.

location.geofencecollection.KmsKeyId.Description: A key identifier for an [AWS KMS customer managed key](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/create-keys.html). Enter a key ID, key ARN, alias name, or alias ARN.

location.geofencecollection.PricingPlan.Description: No longer used. If included, the only allowed value is `RequestBasedUsage`.

location.geofencecollection.PricingPlanD.Description: This parameter is no longer used.
